hero.title: Distributed data and powerful tooling with Prisma & CockroachDB
hero.description: Manage your data at scale with CockroachDB and Prisma – a next-generation ORM for Node.js and TypeScript.

cards.title: Zero downtime migrations
cards.description: CockroachDB clusters your databases into a single logical database, allowing it to apply schema migrations incrementally.

cards.title: Introspection & optimization tools
cards.description: Introspection allows you to pull down an easy-to-read representation of your database's schema. Here you have the ability to view and modify your indexes.

cards.title: Deploy to multiple cloud providers
cards.description: CockroachDB multi-cloud deployments allow you to avoid cloud-specific outages by deploying your database cluster to multiple providers at once.

cards.title: Type-safe database client
cards.description: Prisma Client ensures fully type-safe database queries with benefits like autocompletion - even in JavaScript.

cards.title: Referential integrity with serverless
cards.description: CockroachDB's distributed data model allows you to manage your relational data as if it were in a single logical database.

cards.title: Intuitive data modeling
cards.description: Prisma's modeling language is declarative and lets you intuitively describe your database schema.

how.title: How Prisma and CockroachDB fit together
how.description:
CockroachDB is a relational, PostgreSQL wire-protocol-compatible database built for cloud applications and services. It automates the task of scale, so developers no longer have to choose between the data integrity offered by a relational database or the availability of NoSQL. And, when using CockroachDB developers don't have to worry about deployment or ongoing administration/management of the database.

Prisma is an open-source ORM that integrates seamlessly with CockroachDB and supports the full development cycle. Prisma helps you define your database schema declaratively using the Prisma schema and fetch data from CockroachDB with full type safety using Prisma Client.

Together the two technologies give developers access to the scalable infrastructure of a distributed database without requiring them to be experts in hosting and scaling databases.

quote.text: CockroachDB and Prisma is a match made in heaven. Not only does it simplify data but it also eliminates database operations so you can focus on what you want to…your code.

cards.title: CockroachDB data source connector documentation
cards.description: This section of the docs covers the details of Prisma's CockroachDB data source connector.

cards.title: Using Prisma with CockroachDB
cards.description: In this section of the docs, you will learn about the concepts behind using Prisma and CockroachDB, the commonalities and differences between CockroachDB and other database providers, and the process for configuring your application to integrate with CockroachDB.
